04999.summary: Drive modernization from utility modules outward using focused tests and compatibility exports.

metadata.tradeoffs: slower migration but lower regression risk

0a7fc.summary: TypeScript toolchain upgrades require modern module resolution and stricter binary typing.
0a7fc.content:
Toolchain compatibility note:
- After the dependency update, TypeScript needed modern module resolution to keep resolving obsidian and CodeMirror packages without editor deprecation noise.
- Setting tsconfig moduleResolution to bundler restored package resolution cleanly under the current TypeScript toolchain.
- The stricter compiler also required converting Node Buffers to copied ArrayBuffers before passing them to vault.createBinary.
